title: MyMoney
description: This mod adds coins to the minecraft world
body:
### Mod Description: "Money"

This mod adds five types of coins to Minecraft, each with its own unique material:

- **Bronze Coin**: Perfect for everyday spending and small purchases.
- **Iron Coin**: A sturdy option for more significant transactions.
- **Gold Coin**: Luxury and shine for special occasions.
- **Platinum Coin**: Top of the line for connoisseurs.
- **Diamond Coin**: The rarest and most valuable, a symbol of wealth and success.

With these coins you can create your own economic systems, trade with friends or use them as rewards for completing tasks. Try and appreciate a new level of gaming experience!
